message:
fix: correct nextafter bit manipulation for negative numbers

The previous implementation incorrectly handled negative floating-point
values. For negative numbers in IEEE 754:
- Adding 1 to bits moves AWAY from zero (more negative)
- Subtracting 1 from bits moves TOWARDS zero (less negative)

This was backwards in the original code. Now correctly handles:
- nextafter(-1.0, 0.0) returns -0.9999... (closer to zero)
- nextafter(-1.0, -2.0) returns -1.0000...2 (further from zero)

Added tests for negative number edge cases to prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
